title: Build BrainBox gamified educational platform with Energy Meter system and Olympiad prep

requirements.text: Create animated welcome screen displaying 'Welcome to BrainBox! 🧠⚡' with tagline 'Charge Your Brain. Unlock Your Game.' and a bold 'Let's Start' button with smooth transitions

quotes: The app should open with a vibrant animated welcome screen displaying "Welcome to BrainBox! 🧠⚡" and the tagline "Charge Your Brain. Unlock Your Game." with smooth transitions and a bold "Let's Start" button

acceptanceCriteria: Welcome screen displays the exact text 'Welcome to BrainBox! 🧠⚡'
Tagline 'Charge Your Brain. Unlock Your Game.' is visible
Bold 'Let's Start' button triggers onboarding flow
Screen includes smooth animations and transitions

requirements.text: Implement onboarding flow asking users to select grade (Grade 1-12), educational system (CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, Other), and for Grades 11-12 ask stream selection (Science, Commerce, Humanities)

quotes: During onboarding, the app must ask users to select their grade (Grade 1–12), their educational system (CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, or Other)

acceptanceCriteria: Grade selection dropdown shows grades 1 through 12
Educational system selection shows CBSE, ICSE, State Board, IB, IGCSE, and Other
For grades 11-12, additional stream selection appears (Science, Commerce, Humanities)
Selected preferences are stored in user profile

requirements.text: Automatically generate appropriate subject list based on selected grade and stream: Grades 1-5 (English, Mathematics, EVS, General Knowledge, Computer Basics), Grades 6-8 (English, Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Computer Science), Grades 9-10 (English, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Social Science, Computer Science), Grades 11-12 Science (Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics, Computer Science), Grades 11-12 Commerce (Accounts, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics), Grades 11-12 Humanities (History, Political Science, Geography, etc.)

quotes: then automatically generate a subject list appropriate to their grade and stream

acceptanceCriteria: Subject list automatically populates based on grade selection
Grades 1-5 show 5 subjects as specified
Grades 6-8 show 5 subjects as specified
Grades 9-10 show 7 subjects as specified
Grades 11-12 show stream-specific subjects
Subject cards appear on dashboard after onboarding

requirements.text: Implement Energy Meter gamification system where students earn +5 energy per correct answer, +20 energy per completed quiz set, +10 energy for every 15 minutes of focused study time tracked by in-app timer, bonus energy for daily streaks, consistency rewards, and milestone achievements

quotes: BrainBox must include a powerful Energy Meter gamification system where students earn +5 energy per correct answer, +20 energy per completed quiz set, +10 energy for every 15 minutes of focused study time

acceptanceCriteria: Correct answers award +5 energy immediately
Completed quiz sets award +20 energy
Study timer tracks time and awards +10 energy per 15-minute session
Daily streak counter awards bonus energy
Energy meter updates in real-time on dashboard
All energy transactions are stored persistently

requirements.text: Add combo bonus system that awards extra energy for answering multiple questions correctly in a row during quizzes

quotes: Add combo bonuses for answering multiple questions correctly in a row

acceptanceCriteria: Combo counter tracks consecutive correct answers
Bonus energy increases with longer combos
Combo breaks when answer is incorrect
Visual feedback shows combo status during quiz

requirements.text: Create energy spending system where students can unlock mini-games (Word Rush, Math Blaster, Science Snap, Memory Grid, Quiz Battle Mode), customize avatars with outfits/themes/accessories, unlock new themes and sound packs, access challenge tournaments, and unlock advanced mastery levels

quotes: Energy can be used to unlock mini-games (Word Rush, Math Blaster, Science Snap, Memory Grid, Quiz Battle Mode), customize avatars (outfits, themes, accessories), unlock new themes and sound packs

acceptanceCriteria: Energy shop displays unlockable items with energy costs
Five mini-games are available for unlock
Avatar customization options can be purchased with energy
Theme and sound pack unlocks are available
Tournament and mastery level unlocks work correctly
Energy balance updates when items are purchased

requirements.text: Implement daily quests, weekly missions, Energy Boost Hours (surprise time-limited events), seasonal events, and limited-time academic challenges that award bonus energy

quotes: Include daily quests, weekly missions, surprise "Energy Boost Hours," seasonal events, and limited-time academic challenges

acceptanceCriteria: Daily quests reset every 24 hours
Weekly missions reset every 7 days
Energy Boost Hours provide temporary multipliers
Seasonal events appear at appropriate times
Challenge progress is tracked and rewarded
Notification system alerts users to active events

requirements.text: Build dashboard displaying animated energy bar, streak counter, daily goal progress tracker, subject cards with progress indicators, achievement shelf, optional privacy-safe leaderboard, performance insights, and 'Continue Learning' button with AI-powered weak topic suggestions

quotes: The dashboard should display an animated energy bar, streak counter, daily goal progress tracker, subject cards, achievement shelf, leaderboard (optional and privacy-safe), performance insights

acceptanceCriteria: Animated energy bar shows current energy level
Streak counter displays consecutive days of activity
Daily goal tracker shows progress toward goals
Subject cards are clickable and show mastery level
Achievement shelf displays earned badges
Leaderboard can be toggled on/off for privacy
'Continue Learning' button suggests weak topics

requirements.text: Create learning system with multiple question types: multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blanks, match-the-following, drag-and-drop activities, reasoning questions for higher grades, diagram-based and visual questions, with timed quizzes, adaptive difficulty levels, and instant explanations after every answer

quotes: The learning system should include multiple-choice questions, fill-in-the-blanks, match-the-following, drag-and-drop activities, reasoning questions for higher grades, diagram-based and visual questions

acceptanceCriteria: All six question types are implemented and functional
Quiz timer displays countdown when enabled
Difficulty adapts based on student performance
Instant explanation appears after each answer
Question types are grade-appropriate
Visual and diagram-based questions display correctly

requirements.text: Implement positive feedback system showing 'Boom! That's brain power!' for correct answers and constructive responses like 'Almost there! Let's review that concept together.' for incorrect answers, maintaining friendly and motivating tone

quotes: Provide positive feedback such as "Boom! That's brain power!" for correct answers and constructive responses like "Almost there! Let's review that concept together." for incorrect ones

acceptanceCriteria: Correct answers display encouraging messages
Incorrect answers show constructive feedback
Feedback animations are smooth and non-intrusive
Tone remains friendly and age-appropriate
Multiple feedback variations prevent repetition

requirements.text: Build mastery tracking system with concept strength meters, revision reminders, spaced repetition for difficult topics, and smart 'Practice Again' button that identifies weak areas

quotes: Include mastery tracking, concept strength meters, revision reminders, spaced repetition for difficult topics, and a smart "Practice Again" button

acceptanceCriteria: Each concept has a visual strength meter
Revision reminders appear for unmastered concepts
Spaced repetition algorithm schedules review sessions
'Practice Again' button targets weak topics
Mastery progress is saved and persistent

requirements.text: Create study resources including interactive study notes, quick summary cards, flashcards with flip animations, and placeholder for short concept videos that are age-appropriate and educational-only

quotes: Add interactive study notes, quick summary cards, flashcards, and short concept videos (age-appropriate and safe)

acceptanceCriteria: Interactive notes are organized by subject and topic
Summary cards display key concepts clearly
Flashcards have smooth flip animations
Video placeholders are marked for future integration
All content is grade-appropriate

requirements.text: Implement secure user authentication system with Internet Identity integration, optional parental control access portal, screen-time limit settings, break reminders with messages like 'Quick 5-min break? Your brain deserves it!', and progress report generation for parents

quotes: include a secure login system with optional parental control access, screen-time limits, break reminders ("Quick 5-min break? Your brain deserves it!"), progress reports sent to parents

acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate via Internet Identity
Parental control portal is accessible with separate login
Screen-time limits are enforceable
Break reminders appear at configurable intervals
Progress reports can be viewed by authorized parents
All data handling follows child-safe privacy standards

requirements.text: Ensure strict safety measures: no external ads, no unsafe links, educational-only content, privacy protection, child-safe data handling, disabled or heavily moderated chat if multiplayer exists, and clear reporting tools for concerns

quotes: safe chat disabled or heavily moderated (if multiplayer exists), no external ads or unsafe links, strict educational-only content, privacy protection, child-safe data handling

acceptanceCriteria: No third-party advertisements appear anywhere
All external links are blocked or educational-only
Content is verified to be age-appropriate
User data is encrypted and protected
Multiplayer features (if added) have moderation
Reporting mechanism is visible and functional

requirements.text: Add accessibility features: text-to-speech for questions and content, adjustable font sizes, dyslexia-friendly font option, dark and light mode toggle, offline practice mode for limited internet, and low-data mode

quotes: Add accessibility features such as text-to-speech, adjustable font sizes, dyslexia-friendly font option, dark and light modes, offline practice mode for limited internet access, low-data mode

acceptanceCriteria: Text-to-speech works for all text content
Font size can be adjusted in settings
Dyslexia-friendly font option is available
Dark and light modes switch smoothly
Offline mode caches essential content
Low-data mode reduces resource loading

requirements.text: Create smooth pop-up notification system for Level Up, Concept Mastered, Energy Full, Streak Milestone, Achievement Unlocked, and Study Reminder events that are non-intrusive and dismissible

quotes: Include efficient pop-ups such as Level Up, Concept Mastered, Energy Full, Streak Milestone, Achievement Unlocked, and Study Reminder, ensuring they are smooth and non-intrusive

acceptanceCriteria: All six pop-up types are implemented
Animations are smooth and professional
Pop-ups don't block critical UI elements
Users can dismiss pop-ups easily
Pop-ups queue properly when multiple events occur

requirements.text: Add supplementary learning tools: motivational quotes display, calming background music options with on/off toggle, customizable sound effects, focus mode (distraction-free UI), exam countdown tracker, timetable planner, homework reminder section, and goal-setting feature for target scores

quotes: Add motivational quotes, calming background music options, customizable sound effects, a focus mode (distraction-free), exam countdown tracker, timetable planner, homework reminder section, and goal-setting feature

acceptanceCriteria: Motivational quotes rotate on dashboard
Background music can be toggled and volume adjusted
Sound effects are customizable in settings
Focus mode hides non-essential UI elements
Exam countdown shows days remaining
Timetable planner allows schedule entry
Homework reminders send notifications
Goal-setting interface saves target scores

requirements.text: Design modern UI with brain and lightning theme, colorful but not distracting palette (avoid overuse of blue and purple unless intentional), smooth animations, clean typography, intuitive navigation, and fully responsive design for all devices

quotes: Ensure the UI is modern, colorful but not distracting, built around a brain and lightning theme, with smooth animations, clean typography, intuitive navigation, and responsive design

acceptanceCriteria: Visual design incorporates brain and lightning motifs
Color palette is vibrant but maintains readability
All animations run at 60fps on target devices
Typography is clear and age-appropriate
Navigation is intuitive for young users
UI adapts properly to mobile and desktop screens

requirements.text: Implement weekly performance analytics displaying accuracy percentage, time spent learning, improvement graphs over time, weak-topic detection algorithm, and AI study suggestions like 'Revise Algebra today'

quotes: Include weekly performance analytics showing accuracy percentage, time spent learning, improvement graphs, weak-topic detection, AI study suggestions like "Revise Algebra today"

acceptanceCriteria: Weekly analytics page shows all required metrics
Accuracy percentage is calculated correctly
Time tracking is accurate and persistent
Improvement graphs display trend data
Algorithm identifies weakest topics
AI suggestions are contextually relevant

requirements.text: Create achievement badge system with badges including Brain Starter, Energy Master, 7-Day Streak Hero, Math Wizard, Science Champ, and other milestone achievements that unlock based on student progress

quotes: achievement badges such as Brain Starter, Energy Master, 7-Day Streak Hero, Math Wizard, and Science Champ

acceptanceCriteria: All specified badges are created with unique designs
Badge unlock conditions are defined and functional
Achievement shelf displays earned badges
Unlock animations celebrate achievement
Badge progress is tracked persistently

requirements.text: Generate grade-appropriate questions with difficulty calibrated to each grade level, ensuring questions are challenging but not beyond student capability

quotes: Don't forget to make questions bit difficult but as per their grade level

acceptanceCriteria: Questions match curriculum standards for each grade
Difficulty scales appropriately across grade levels
Questions challenge students without overwhelming
Content accuracy is maintained for all subjects

requirements.text: Add 'Want to prepare for Olympiads?' option prominently at the top of the dashboard with information section explaining Olympiad preparation benefits and a 5-question diagnostic quiz to assess readiness

quotes: Include a separate option want to prepare for olympiads? At the top. And give information about it and ask for a short quiz 5 points quiz

acceptanceCriteria: Olympiad option is visible at top of dashboard
Information section explains Olympiad preparation clearly
5-question diagnostic quiz is available
Quiz assesses student's current level
Results provide guidance on Olympiad readiness

requirements.text: Implement five unlockable mini-games: Word Rush (word/vocabulary game), Math Blaster (fast-paced math challenges), Science Snap (science quiz game), Memory Grid (memory matching game), and Quiz Battle Mode (competitive quiz format)

quotes: unlock mini-games (Word Rush, Math Blaster, Science Snap, Memory Grid, Quiz Battle Mode)

acceptanceCriteria: All five mini-games are fully playable
Each game has distinct mechanics and rules
Mini-games award energy and achievements
Games are locked until purchased with energy
Scores and progress are tracked for each game

constraints: Must use Internet Identity for authentication only
No external authentication providers (Facebook, GitHub, Auth0) allowed
No third-party AI service integrations (OpenAI, Anthropic)
No real-time WebSocket features or real-time chat
All content must be educational-only with no external ads
Must maintain child-safe privacy standards and data protection
Frontend must use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
Backend must use Motoko with single-actor architecture
nonGoals: Integration with external educational content APIs
Social media sharing or external social features
Support for languages other than English initially

required: Vibrant animated brain with lightning bolts for welcome screen hero image, modern gradient style with energetic feel (brainbox-hero.dim_1200x600.png)
Energy meter icon showing charging battery with brain symbol, glowing effect suitable for UI (energy-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Achievement badge for Brain Starter milestone, colorful trophy design (badge-brain-starter.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge for Energy Master milestone, electric theme (badge-energy-master.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge for 7-Day Streak Hero milestone, fire/flame theme (badge-streak-hero.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge for Math Wizard milestone, mathematical symbols theme (badge-math-wizard.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge for Science Champ milestone, science lab theme (badge-science-champ.dim_256x256.png)
Mini-game icon for Word Rush game, letters and speed theme (minigame-word-rush.dim_256x256.png)
Mini-game icon for Math Blaster game, numbers and explosion theme (minigame-math-blaster.dim_256x256.png)
Mini-game icon for Science Snap game, beaker and molecule theme (minigame-science-snap.dim_256x256.png)
Mini-game icon for Memory Grid game, grid pattern with brain symbol (minigame-memory-grid.dim_256x256.png)
Mini-game icon for Quiz Battle Mode game, competitive trophy theme (minigame-quiz-battle.dim_256x256.png)
Background pattern for dashboard with subtle brain and lightning motifs, light theme version (dashboard-bg-light.dim_1920x1080.png)
Background pattern for dashboard with subtle brain and lightning motifs, dark theme version (dashboard-bg-dark.dim_1920x1080.png)
Olympiad preparation banner image with trophy and academic symbols (olympiad-banner.dim_800x200.png)
